news.title:
Adani Green Energy surged 23.2x in volume to 72.71L shares, up 6.2% to Rs.908.2.
Zydus Wellness saw a 17.2x volume rise to 6.87L shares, up 12% to Rs.497.25.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy surged 23.2x in volume to 72.71L shares, up 6.2% to Rs.908.2.
Zydus Wellness saw a 17.2x volume rise to 6.87L shares, up 12% to Rs.497.25.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy saw an NSE block trade for ~5.3M shares at Rs. 825.3.
The trade was valued at Rs. 437.2 crore, highlighting significant investor activity.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy saw an NSE block trade for ~5.3M shares at Rs. 825.3.
The trade was valued at Rs. 437.2 crore, highlighting significant investor activity.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy added 5 GW renewable capacity in FY26, excluding China.
Total capacity is 19.3 GW, with 36M tonnes carbon offset and 1,376 MWh storage.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy added 5 GW renewable capacity in FY26, excluding China.
Total capacity is 19.3 GW, with 36M tonnes carbon offset and 1,376 MWh storage.

news.title: Adani Green engages external contractors for the first time to support its expansion.
news.summary: Adani Green engages external contractors for the first time to support its expansion.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy taps external contractors, including L&T, Sterling & Wilson, and KPI Green, for expansion.
Shares fell 3.1% to ₹806.8 on BSE; market capitalization at ₹1.33 trillion amid broader renewable stock pullback.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy taps external contractors, including L&T, Sterling & Wilson, and KPI Green, for expansion.
Shares fell 3.1% to ₹806.8 on BSE; market capitalization at ₹1.33 trillion amid broader renewable stock pullback.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy's board to meet on April 24, 2026, for FY26 financial results.
Trading window will be closed from April 1-26, 2026; investor call scheduled on April 24, 2026.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy's board to meet on April 24, 2026, for FY26 financial results.
Trading window will be closed from April 1-26, 2026; investor call scheduled on April 24, 2026.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy operationalized 951 MW renewable projects in Rajasthan and Gujarat.
Total operational capacity reached 18,933.3 MW; plants to begin operations from March 30, 2026.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy operationalized 951 MW renewable projects in Rajasthan and Gujarat.
Total operational capacity reached 18,933.3 MW; plants to begin operations from March 30, 2026.

news.title:
Bombay HC rejected Adani Green Energy's request for a CBI bribery probe.
The decision prevents escalation of the bribery case to central investigation.
news.summary:
Bombay HC rejected Adani Green Energy's request for a CBI bribery probe.
The decision prevents escalation of the bribery case to central investigation.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy operationalizes 510.1 MW projects in Khavda, Gujarat.
Renewable capacity rises to 17,982.3 MW, including solar, wind, and hybrid projects.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy operationalizes 510.1 MW projects in Khavda, Gujarat.
Renewable capacity rises to 17,982.3 MW, including solar, wind, and hybrid projects.

news.title:
Adani Green surged 3.8%, hitting Rs 886.95 intraday on 20 Mar 2026.
The stock outperformed its sector and broader market, reflecting strong momentum.
news.summary:
Adani Green surged 3.8%, hitting Rs 886.95 intraday on 20 Mar 2026.
The stock outperformed its sector and broader market, reflecting strong momentum.

news.title:
Delhi HC upholds SECI's 2023 decision reallocating 2.33 GW solar capacity to Adani Green.
PIL alleged bidding irregularities in solar projects, claiming public exchequer losses.
news.summary:
Delhi HC upholds SECI's 2023 decision reallocating 2.33 GW solar capacity to Adani Green.
PIL alleged bidding irregularities in solar projects, claiming public exchequer losses.

news.title:
FIIs invested $497M in Indian power stocks in Feb 2026, driven by rising electricity demand from AI and data centres.
GMR Power surged 19.5%, Torrent Power 14%, Adani Green Energy 11%, NTPC 8%, JSW Energy 6.1%, and Tata Power 3% in Feb.
news.summary:
FIIs invested $497M in Indian power stocks in Feb 2026, driven by rising electricity demand from AI and data centres.
GMR Power surged 19.5%, Torrent Power 14%, Adani Green Energy 11%, NTPC 8%, JSW Energy 6.1%, and Tata Power 3% in Feb.

news.title:
Fino Payments, Adani Green, NCC, Tata Steel, Thermax, and NIACL to remain in focus amid diverse market developments.
Adani Green operationalizes 185 MW wind project; Tata Steel divests Odisha Ferro Alloy Plant for ₹610 crore.
news.summary:
Fino Payments, Adani Green, NCC, Tata Steel, Thermax, and NIACL to remain in focus amid diverse market developments.
Adani Green operationalizes 185 MW wind project; Tata Steel divests Odisha Ferro Alloy Plant for ₹610 crore.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy's subsidiary commissions 185 MW wind project in Gujarat.
AGEL's total operational renewable capacity rises to 17,472.2 MW.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy's subsidiary commissions 185 MW wind project in Gujarat.
AGEL's total operational renewable capacity rises to 17,472.2 MW.

news.title: Norway's wealth fund declines investment in Adani Green citing corruption allegations.
news.summary: Norway's wealth fund declines investment in Adani Green citing corruption allegations.

news.title:
Norway's $1.2T wealth fund excludes Adani Green Energy over alleged financial crime links.
Norges Bank had earlier excluded Adani Ports in May 2024, adding AGEL to its exclusion list.
news.summary:
Norway's $1.2T wealth fund excludes Adani Green Energy over alleged financial crime links.
Norges Bank had earlier excluded Adani Ports in May 2024, adding AGEL to its exclusion list.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy establishes Adani Renewable Energy Middle East to expand in the region.
The new branch aims to bolster operations in the renewable energy sector.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy establishes Adani Renewable Energy Middle East to expand in the region.
The new branch aims to bolster operations in the renewable energy sector.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy Ltd has incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary, Adani Renewable Energy Middle East Ltd (AREMEL), on Feb 25, 2026.
AREMEL, based in the UAE, will focus on renewable energy generation with 100% shareholding held by Adani Green Energy.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy Ltd has incorporated a wholly-owned subsidiary, Adani Renewable Energy Middle East Ltd (AREMEL), on Feb 25, 2026.
AREMEL, based in the UAE, will focus on renewable energy generation with 100% shareholding held by Adani Green Energy.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy's subsidiary forms Skyspin Energy to focus on renewable energy.
Skyspin Energy aims to generate, develop, and distribute power using wind, solar, and renewables.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy's subsidiary forms Skyspin Energy to focus on renewable energy.
Skyspin Energy aims to generate, develop, and distribute power using wind, solar, and renewables.

news.title:
TotalEnergies sold a 1.7% stake in Adani Green Energy for Rs 2,778.09 crore via block deals.
The sale reduced its holding in Adani Green Energy from 18.99% to 17.25%.
news.summary:
TotalEnergies sold a 1.7% stake in Adani Green Energy for Rs 2,778.09 crore via block deals.
The sale reduced its holding in Adani Green Energy from 18.99% to 17.25%.
